name: Bob Noble Park
description: These courts are beautiful and in a beautiful setting.  There is a decent amount of shade close by and they have shaded benches down the middle between courts.  When it is nice outside, they are typically busy!

name: Country Club of Paducah
description: Country Club of Paducah is a place to play pickleball in Paducah, KY. There are 7 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: First Baptist Church Paducah
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Church Paducah in Paducah, KY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Heath Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Heath Community Park in United States, KY! There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Idle Hour Park
description: Come play pickleball at Idle Hour Park in United States, KY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Paducah Athletic Club or PAC
description: Paducah Athletic Club or PAC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Paducah, KY. The court surface is acrylic. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Paducah Convention & Expo Center
description: Come play pickleball at Paducah Convention & Expo Center in Paducah, KY! There are 6 indoor hard and wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Schedule is subject to other events happening at this event center.
fees: Fee required — $5 per day / monthly pass available for purchase for $30

name: Rolling Hills Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Rolling Hills Country Club in Paducah, KY! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $10 for Non-Member with a Member present

name: “Ski Nuts” Ski Lake
description: “Ski Nuts” Ski Lake is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Paducah, KY. The court surface is acrylic. Amenities include restrooms.

name: West Kentucky Community Technical College
description: Come play pickleball at West Kentucky Community Technical College in Paducah, KY! There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
